example: The clock on the wall shows the time.
translation: 墙上的时钟显示时间。

example: Our class starts at two o'clock in the afternoon.
translation: 我们的课在下午两点开始。

example: There are fifteen students in our class.
translation: 我们班有十五个学生。

meaning: n.一半 adj.一半的 adv.一半地
example: I ate half of the apple for breakfast.
translation: 我早餐吃了半个苹果。

meaning: adj.过去的；以往的；昔日的 prep.经 过；超过；晚于 n.过去；昔日 adv.经 过
example: We walked past the park on our way home.
translation: 我们在回家的路上经过公园。

example: School starts at half past eight every morning.
translation: 学校每天早上八点半开始上课。

example: The test took me forty-five minutes to complete.
translation: 考试花了我四十五分钟完成。

example: We tried to beat the clock and finish before time ran out.
translation: 我们试图赶在时间用完之前完成。

meaning: n.生活；生命；人生；个人生活
example: We should cherish every moment of our life.
translation: 我们应该珍惜生活的每一刻。

meaning: n.工作；任务；活动；作业 v.分派任 务
example: The teacher gives us a new task every day.
translation: 老师每天给我们布置新任务。

example: We have English class for one hour every day.
translation: 我们每天有一小时的英语课。

example: My home is two kilometres away from school.
translation: 我家离学校有两公里远。

meaning: n.沙拉；色拉；蔬菜沙拉；混合沙拉
example: I like to eat salad with vegetables and fruits.
translation: 我喜欢吃蔬菜和水果沙拉。

meaning: v.是；动词be的第一人称单数现在式 abbr.上午；antemeridiem的缩写
example: I wake up at 7:00 am every morning.
translation: 我每天早上七点起床。

example: School ends at 3:00 pm every day.
translation: 学校每天下午三点放学。

example: My family watches TV together in the evening.
translation: 我的家人在晚上一起看电视。

example: I eat breakfast at home before going to school.
translation: 我上学前在家吃早餐。

example: We have many fun activities in our school.
translation: 我们学校有很多有趣的活动。

example: This year we have a new English teacher.
translation: 今年我们有一位新的英语老师。

example: The weather is warm all year round in Hainan.
translation: 海南的天气一年到头都很温暖。

meaning: adv.什么时候，何时 conj.当...的时候
example: When do you usually get up in the morning?
translation: 你早上通常什么时候起床？

example: January is the first month of the year.
translation: 一月是一年的第一个月。

example: February is the shortest month of the year.
translation: 二月是一年中最短的月份。

example: Spring begins in March in China.
translation: 在中国，春天从三月开始。

example: April is a beautiful month with many flowers.
translation: 四月是一个有很多花的美丽月份。

example: May Day is a holiday in many countries.
translation: 五一节在很多国家是一个假期。

example: School usually ends in June for summer vacation.
translation: 学校通常在六月结束放暑假。

example: July is the hottest month in summer.
translation: 七月是夏天最热的月份。

example: We often go to the beach in August.
translation: 我们经常在八月去海滩。

example: School starts in September every year.
translation: 学校每年九月开学。

example: October is a good time to visit Beijing.
translation: 十月是参观北京的好时间。

example: The weather gets colder in November.
translation: 十一月天气变得更冷。

meaning: v.纪念；记得，记住；记起，回想起
example: I remember my first day at school.
translation: 我记得我上学的第一天。

example: December is the last month of the year.
translation: 十二月是一年的最后一个月。

meaning: v.吞咽；轻信 n.燕子；吞咽
example: The swallow flies back to the north in spring.
translation: 燕子在春天飞回北方。

example: We have lunch at school during lunchtime.
translation: 我们在午餐时间在学校吃午饭。

meaning: n.婴儿；幼兽；幼⻦ adj.幼小的
example: The baby is sleeping in the cradle.
translation: 婴儿在摇篮里睡觉。

example: We have art class every Wednesday.
translation: 我们每周三有美术课。

example: Our math lesson is very interesting today.
translation: 我们今天的数学课很有趣。

example: I take a photo with my friends at the park.
translation: 我和朋友在公园拍照。

meaning: v.移动；搬动；（使）改变位置；搬家 n.行动；移动
example: We move to a new house next month.
translation: 我们下个月搬到新房子。

example: Many birds fly to the south in winter.
translation: 很多鸟在冬天飞到南方。

example: There are many books on the bookshelf.
translation: 书架上有很多书。

example: I turn on the lamp to read at night.
translation: 我晚上开灯看书。

example: My family sits on the sofa to watch TV.
translation: 我的家人坐在沙发上看电视。

meaning: n.桌子；台子；表格 v.把......列入议事 日程；搁置
example: We put the books on the table.
translation: 我们把书放在桌子上。

example: I go to bed at 9:00 pm every night.
translation: 我每晚九点上床睡觉。

meaning: v.离开；使保留；把......留下；忘了带 ，丢下；离开；遗弃 n.假期，休假
example: We leave home early in the morning for school.
translation: 我们早上很早就离开家去上学。

meaning: n.包；袋；购物袋；手提袋；提包；书 包；纸袋，塑料袋
example: I carry my books in a school bag.
translation: 我用书包装书。

example: I drink water from a cup every day.
translation: 我每天用杯子喝水。

example: My mom cooks meals in the kitchen.
translation: 我妈妈在厨房做饭。

example: We have a big TV in the living room.
translation: 我们在客厅有一台大电视。

meaning: n.浴室，盥洗室；洗手间，卫生间
example: I brush my teeth in the bathroom every morning.
translation: 我每天早上在浴室刷牙。

example: I have a comfortable bed in my bedroom.
translation: 我在卧室有一张舒适的床。

meaning: v.收拾；使整洁；整理 adj.整洁的；整 ⻬的
example: I keep my room tidy and clean.
translation: 我保持我的房间整洁干净。

example: My dad drives a car to work every day.
translation: 我爸爸每天开车去上班。

meaning: adj.不同的，不一样的，有区别的
example: We have different opinions about the movie.
translation: 我们对这部电影有不同的看法。

meaning: adv.一起，在一起，共同，一⻬，一块 儿
example: We work together to finish the project.
translation: 我们一起完成这个项目。

meaning: adv.有可能；也许；大概；可能（表示 不肯定），或许
example: Maybe we can go to the park tomorrow.
translation: 也许我们明天可以去公园。

meaning: adv.（常用于否定句和疑问句末）再也 （不）;（不）再 pron.两者，两者都 det./adj.两者的 ，两个；两个都 conj.不仅......而且
example: I don't play with that toy anymore.
translation: 我不再玩那个玩具了。

example: Both my brother and I like playing football.
translation: 我和我哥哥都喜欢踢足球。

example: My mom calls me on the phone every day.
translation: 我妈妈每天打电话给我。

meaning: n.天赋，才能，礼物，赠品 .白送
example: I receive a birthday gift from my parents.
translation: 我从父母那里收到一份生日礼物。

meaning: auxv.将要，会；愿意 v.愿意；遗赠 n.意志；意愿；遗嘱
example: I will study hard to get good grades.
translation: 我会努力学习取得好成绩。

meaning: adv.其实；实际上；当然；确实；真正 地
example: The movie is indeed very interesting.
translation: 这部电影确实很有趣。

example: Our new classmate is very friendly.
translation: 我们的新同学很友好。

meaning: n.旅行；旅程 v.绊倒；出差错；轻快 地走
example: We take a school trip to the zoo every year.
translation: 我们每年学校组织去动物园旅行。

example: We learn about Chinese history in class.
translation: 我们在课堂上学习中国历史。

meaning: n.植物；作物；⻋间；装置；工厂；发 电厂 v.种植；栽培；安置；放置
example: We plant trees in the park every spring.
translation: 我们每年春天在公园种树。

example: We visit the science museum on weekends.
translation: 我们周末参观科学博物馆。

example: There are many trees in the forest.
translation: 森林里有很多树。

meaning: adj.最后的；最近的；上一个的；刚过 去的，最近过去的 adv.最后；最近 v.持续
example: The meeting lasts for two hours.
translation: 会议持续了两个小时。

example: My mom likes going shopping on weekends.
translation: 我妈妈喜欢周末去购物。

meaning: adv.很快，不久，即刻，⻢上;快 n.笔记；记录；便条；注释；提醒；音 符；音调；语气 v.注意；指出；备注
example: We will finish our homework soon.
translation: 我们很快就会完成作业。

example: I write a note to remind myself.
translation: 我写了一张便条提醒自己。

example: The beech tree has smooth bark.
translation: 山毛榉树有光滑的树皮。

example: The room is five metres long.
translation: 房间有五米长。

example: The lark sings beautifully in the morning.
translation: 云雀在早晨唱得很美。

example: I write a letter to my pen pal.
translation: 我给我的笔友写信。

example: My dad reads the newspaper every morning.
translation: 我爸爸每天早上看报纸。

example: We love to explore nature during summer.
translation: 我们喜欢在夏天探索大自然。

meaning: n.（动植物）保护区；储藏（量）; vt.预订；预留；保留
example: We should reserve some food for later.
translation: 我们应该留一些食物以后吃。

example: We visit a nature reserve to see wild animals.
translation: 我们参观自然保护区看野生动物。

example: We build sandcastles on the beach.
translation: 我们在海滩上建沙堡。

meaning: prep.离开；不工作；从......去掉；脱 落 adv.离开；不工作；从......去掉 ；断开；休假；休息；减价 v.走开 adj.远离的；空闲的
example: I turn off the light before going to bed.
translation: 我睡觉前关灯。

meaning: adj.流动的；持续的；运作中的 n.跑 ；管理；运作 adv.连续 v.跑步；经营 ；run的现在分词
example: Running is good exercise for our health.
translation: 跑步对我们的健康有好处。

example: We play football on the playground.
translation: 我们在操场上踢足球。

example: We read books in the school library.
translation: 我们在学校图书馆读书。

example: We climb the hill to see the view.
translation: 我们爬山看风景。

meaning: n.表；手表；监视；注意 v.看；观看 ；观察；小心
example: I watch cartoons on TV every evening.
translation: 我每天晚上在电视上看动画片。

meaning: n.规则；条例；规章；统治 v.统治 ；支配；裁决
example: We must follow the school rules.
translation: 我们必须遵守学校规则。

meaning: v.遵循；跟着；听从;跟随；遵守规则 ；仿效；跟得上
example: Please follow me to the classroom.
translation: 请跟我到教室。

meaning: n.时间；时刻，时候；倍；次数；时期 v.计时；安排时间 adj.时间的；定时的 ；分期的
example: We have a good time at the party.
translation: 我们在聚会上玩得很开心。

meaning: adv.特别；格外 adj.顶好的；超级的
example: The superhero saves the city from danger.
translation: 超级英雄从危险中拯救城市。

example: We learn to dance in our PE class.
translation: 我们在体育课上学习跳舞。

example: I play the piano for one hour every day.
translation: 我每天弹钢琴一小时。

example: My sister can play the piano very well.
translation: 我妹妹钢琴弹得很好。

example: We sit quietly in the classroom.
translation: 我们在教室里安静地坐着。

example: The singer sings a beautiful song.
translation: 歌手唱了一首美丽的歌。

example: It snows a lot in winter in the north.
translation: 北方的冬天经常下雪。

example: We make a snowman when it snows.
translation: 下雪时我们堆雪人。

meaning: n.迷；狂热爱好者；粉丝；扇子；电⻛ 扇 v.煽动；吹拂
example: I use a fan to keep cool in summer.
translation: 夏天我用扇子保持凉爽。

meaning: adv.喧闹地；大声地；响亮地；吵闹地 ；嘈杂地 auxv.必须；一定要；应该 n.必须做的
example: The children laugh loudly in the park.
translation: 孩子们在公园里大声笑。

example: We must finish our homework before dinner.
translation: 我们必须在晚饭前完成作业。

example: The dinosaur is a huge prehistoric animal.
translation: 恐龙是一种巨大的史前动物。

example: Dogs like to chew on bones.
translation: 狗喜欢啃骨头。

meaning: adv.突然；突如其来地；忽然；猛然 ；骤然
example: Suddenly, it started to rain heavily.
translation: 突然，开始下大雨了。

example: The storm damaged many houses in the village.
translation: 暴风雨损坏了村里的许多房子。

example: The ancient people lived in caves.
translation: 古代人住在山洞里。

meaning: adj.小心的；注意；细致的，精心的 ，慎重的
example: We must be careful when crossing the street.
translation: 我们过马路时必须小心。

meaning: adj.自由的；免费的；空闲的 adv.自 由地；免费地 v.释放
example: I have free time after finishing my homework.
translation: 我完成作业后有空闲时间。

meaning: n.票；入场券；交通法规罚款单
example: We buy tickets to watch the movie.
translation: 我们买票看电影。

meaning: n.玩家；运动员；演奏者；游戏者；参 赛选手；唱机
example: He is a good football player in our school.
translation: 他是我们学校的一名优秀足球运动员。

meaning: adv.愉快地；高兴地；快乐地；幸福地 ；幸运地
example: The children play happily in the park.
translation: 孩子们在公园里开心地玩。

example: The servant helps the family with housework.
translation: 仆人帮助家庭做家务。

example: The actor plays a role in the movie.
translation: 演员在电影中扮演一个角色。
